name: Suirobo Agent
changelog: New sui_mtf_supertrend_m5 bot skill: multi-timeframe EA — H4 Supertrend(10,3) gates entry direction (green=buy-only, red=sell-only, closed candles only / no lookahead), M5 Supertrend Flip(200,6) fires entries, trailing runner SL2%/TR2.5% with 16h cooldown. Standalone-month tests on real Binance 2025 data: Mar-Sep avg +5.4%/mo (6/7 months positive), full-12-month avg +1.3%/mo. Engine adds the HTF trend-filter module (htfMinutes/htfSupertrendPeriod/htfSupertrendMult) available to all signals + Builder UI.

name: Suirobo Agent
changelog: New btc_breakout_m15 bot skill from the Gold-to-Bitcoin EA research blueprint: Donchian(96) range-breakout entry, Asia-session filter, 2%% risk-per-trade sizing, TP2/SL1, 8-bar cooldown. +45.9%% over FULL YEAR 2025 real Binance M15 data (9/12 months positive, maxDD 15.2%%, PF 1.63) with 0.05%% fee + 0.05%% slippage. Engine adds range_breakout signal + EA time-stop (maxBarsInTrade). Backtest Simulator: BTC unlocked with full-2025 M5/M15/M30/H1 datasets.

name: Suirobo Agent
changelog: New sui_supertrend_m5_v2 bot skill: classic EA flip entry (one trade per trend leg) with tunable ATR period/multiplier — ST(20,5), short side, 16-24h UTC session, TP3/SL1.5, 6-bar cooldown. Verified profitable EVERY month Jan-May 2026 on real Binance M5 data (+12.0%, maxDD 12.6%, PF 1.21, 57 trades) including 0.05% fee + 0.05% slippage per side. Old supertrend wick-catch preset marked LEGACY (re-test showed it unprofitable). Chat-started bots now carry the full EA risk module.

name: Suirobo Agent
changelog: Restored the 0.01 SUI per-open bot fee on the upgraded suirobo_factory v2 contract: 0.005 SUI to the marketplace + 0.005 SUI deterministically to the author of the skill in use (no randomness). Bot opens now pay the fee correctly instead of being blocked. Close trades remain free.

name: Suirobo Agent
changelog: Fix: bot opens no longer abort on the execution-fee step. The deployed suirobo_factory contract still required exactly 0.05 SUI (the new 0.01 SUI fee aborted with EInvalidFeeAmount, blocking every Auto Bot open). The per-open fee is temporarily skipped so bots trade; it will be restored once the fee contract is upgraded to the 0.01 SUI deterministic model.

name: Suirobo Agent
changelog: EA-style bot engine (MT4/MT5-inspired): signals now evaluate on CLOSED candles only (no repaint), TP/SL/breakeven/trailing managed every 10s between candle polls, risk-%% position sizing, breakeven SL move, cooldown bars, max-consecutive-losses stop, daily loss limit, UTC session filter. Backtest and live bot share one engine — identical rules in both.

name: Suirobo Agent
changelog: Full English audit: translated all remaining Vietnamese in bot logs, console output, tool/skill messages and chat tool descriptions (~360 strings). Agent system prompt now replies in the user's language, defaulting to English.

name: Suirobo Agent
changelog: English-only agent output: all bot log lines and API error messages translated (was mixed Vietnamese). No functional changes.

name: Suirobo Agent
changelog: Single-instance auto-replace: opening a new agent version now gracefully stops the old one (POST /api/shutdown, with force-stop fallback for older builds) instead of crashing silently on a port conflict. Friendly error window (15s hold) on port-in-use, and Windows auto-start entry now always points at the latest exe.

name: Suirobo Agent
changelog: Live chart + trade history backend: /api/livebot/candles (the bot's own kline feed for the UI candlestick chart), /api/livebot/history (persisted buy/sell records with PnL + tx digests), /api/livebot/closenow (manual market close that bypasses TP/SL).

name: Suirobo Agent
changelog: Best-manager selection: when a wallet owns multiple SUI/USDC margin accounts, the bot and AI tools now pick the one with the most liquid assets (no-debt preferred) instead of the first match â€” fixes funds deposited into a newer account being invisible/unused.

name: Suirobo Agent
changelog: Critical margin fixes: fresh Pyth price injection before every borrow/repay/withdraw (fixes EInvalidProof aborts in the auto bot + AI margin tools), SUI/USDC manager type-matching (fixes TypeMismatch when wallet owns managers from other pools), withdraw Coin transfer (fixes UnusedValueWithoutDrop).

name: Suirobo Agent
changelog: AI Assistant gains autonomous bot control (list_bot_skills, start/stop/get_auto_bot_status) + Manual/Autonomous tool gate + 0.01 SUI per-OPEN bot fee â†’ skill author (deterministic, no random).

name: Suirobo Agent
changelog: All tool descriptions translated to English for accurate LLM tool-matching

name: Suirobo Agent
changelog: All tool descriptions translated to English for better LLM matching (Vietnamese still supported via prompt)

name: Suirobo Agent
changelog: Fix 2 bugs: (1) DeepSeek schema invalid (exclusiveMinimum booleanâ†’number), (2) OpenClaw finds openclaw.json across multiple paths

name: Suirobo Agent
changelog: Fix exe crash ERR_VM_DYNAMIC_IMPORT â€” static imports for pkg compatibility

extension.name: Suirobo Agent Bridge
extension.description: Chrome extension that proxies HTTP localhost for the HTTPS web app. No need to accept a self-signed cert.
